name: Turkish Eggplant Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook unpeeled eggplant until it is charred on the outside and the flesh is thoroughly soft.
2. Cool slightly, then peel. Wipe clean and squeeze out all the water.
3. Place eggplant in a bowl with lemon juice and salt. Mash well.
4. Add olive oil, garlic, and vinegar; blend thoroughly.
5. Serve on a plate garnished with tomato slices, onion slices, and black Greek olives.
